description: Full cognitive assessment — 12 tasks (3 wellbeing + 9 cognitive), 17 messages. First message responds to ElevenLabs greeting, then wellbeing check-ins, then cognitive tasks. Session index 0 content: word list A (face/silk/church/daisy/red), digit set 0 (forward: 3=[5,8,2] 4=[7,1,8,3] 5=[4,2,7,3,1]; reverse: 3=[2,4,9] 4=[3,8,1,5]), letter F, abstraction set 1 (train/bicycle + watch/ruler), vigilance set 1 (6 A's). Multi-turn tasks: digit forward 3 trials, digit reverse 2 trials, abstraction 2 pairs.
messages: Yes, that sounds! Let's get started.
I'm feeling pretty good today, thank you for asking.
Yes, I slept quite well last night actually. Feeling rested.
No, nothing on my mind really. I'm happy to get started.
Oh let me think... today is Thursday, March 26th, 2026, and we're in spring.
Okay, let me repeat those back. 5, 8, 2.
I think I heard the letter A about 6 times.
Alright, words starting with F... farm, fish, flower, finger, fork, fence, floor, funny, friend, free. That's all I can think of.
Oh, a train and a bicycle... well they're both forms of transportation, both vehicles.
A watch and a ruler — they're both measuring instruments, aren't they?
Let me think back to those words... face, silk, church, daisy, and red.
